channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: James Dean’s Teenage Years in 1940s Indiana
item.description: Before becoming the iconic 'Rebel Without a Cause,' James Dean was a typical teenager growing up in Fairmount, Indiana, during the 1940s. At Fairmount High School, he excelled in sports, particularly ...

item.title: Daniel Ray Leonard arrested near his father’s Los Angeles home for breaching restraining order
item.description: Daniel Ray Leonard, the 25-year-old son of legendary American boxer Sugar Ray Leonard, was apprehended by police at his father's Los Angeles residence after allegedly attempting to enter the property ...

item.title: Jet2 Expands Summer 2026 Schedule with 37 New Routes and 3 New Destinations
item.description: Jet2 has announced a significant expansion of its summer 2026 operations, introducing 37 new routes and three new destinations—La Palma, Palermo, and Samos—bringing the airline's total overseas destin...

item.title: Universities increasingly rescind commencement invitations over controversial views
item.description: In recent years, universities across the United States have increasingly rescinded invitations to commencement speakers due to student protests over controversial viewpoints. Former Northwestern Unive...

item.title: Supreme Court permits care of stray dogs with legal responsibility for bites
item.description: In a significant ruling, the Supreme Court of India has allowed individuals and organisations to care for and feed stray dogs in public spaces, provided they accept legal responsibility for any injuri...

item.title: Philippine Navy Plans Fleet Modernization with Warships and Anti-Sub Helicopters by 2028
item.description: The Philippine Navy announced plans to modernize its fleet with the acquisition of four new warships and six anti-submarine warfare (ASW) helicopters in the coming years, as part of the Armed Forces o...

item.title: Winnipeg Police Seize $37M in Drugs, Arrest 33 in Largest Manitoba Bust
item.description: Winnipeg police have made what they are calling the largest drug bust in Manitoba's history, arresting 33 individuals and seizing more than $37.2 million worth of illegal substances including cocaine,...

item.title: Wes Streeting Delivers Unremarkable Resignation Speech in Commons
item.description: In his first Commons speech since resigning from the cabinet, Wes Streeting delivered a 19-minute address that offered little substance. Observers noted that the speech was largely composed of platitu...

item.title: D.C. Schools Chancellor Lewis Ferebee Resigns to Lead Education Nonprofit
item.description: Lewis D. Ferebee, the longest-serving schools chancellor in Washington, D.C., announced his departure from the role to become the CEO of EdReports, a national education nonprofit. Appointed in 2018, F...

item.title: Kano State orders closure of all schools for Eid-el-Kabir holiday
item.description: Kano State Government don announce say all primary and secondary schools for the state go close ahead of the Eid-el-Kabir celebration. Dis arrangement dey part of the approved academic calendar. Both ...

item.title: Surrey home of Cricket Canada president targeted in suspected extortion shooting
item.description: Early on Wednesday morning, the residence of Arvinder Khosa, the newly-elected president of Cricket Canada, located in the Newton neighbourhood of Surrey, B.C., was targeted in a shooting. Police were...

item.title: Johannesburg Faces Power Cuts as Eskom Seeks R5.2-Billion Payment
item.description: Johannesburg is under serious threat of bulk electricity cuts as Eskom demands payment of a R5.2-billion debt by 8 July 2026, with an additional R1.58-billion due by 5 June 2026. Despite claims from M...

item.title: Rivers governor steps down from APC primary citing unity and stability concerns
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Siminalayi Fubara, has officially withdrawn from the All Progressives Congress (APC) governorship primaries, saying the decision is in the best interest of peace and unity in th...

item.title: Vanessa Trump Announces Breast Cancer Diagnosis and Shares Update on Treatment
item.description: Vanessa Trump, formerly married to Donald Trump Jr., publicly disclosed that she has been diagnosed with breast cancer. In an Instagram post, she stated that she is working closely with her medical te...

item.title: Conservative commentator criticizes Alex Cooper’s lifestyle following her pregnancy announcement
item.description: Alex Cooper, host of the popular podcast 'Call Her Daddy,' recently announced her pregnancy with husband Matt Kaplan, sparking criticism from conservative commentator Allie Beth Stuckey of the 'Relata...

item.title: BJP Responds to Rahul Gandhi’s Criticism of PM Modi’s Gift to Italian PM
item.description: On Wednesday, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) strongly countered Congress leader Rahul Gandhi's remarks against Prime Minister Narendra Modi during his Italy visit. The controversy began after Gandhi...

item.title: Daily Feng Shui Guidance from Master Hanz Cua for May 21, 2026
item.description: On May 21, 2026, Master Hanz Cua shares his daily feng shui predictions to guide individuals in harmonizing their surroundings and energy flow. While the detailed predictions were not fully published ...

item.title: Desmond Elliot Withdraws from Lagos Assembly Primaries Amid Tensions
item.description: Nigerians don dey hear news say Desmond Elliot, the Nollywood actor wey don turn politician, don officially withdraw from the Lagos State House of Assembly re-election race. Dis one happen during the ...

item.title: Fox News Poll Shows Rising Economic Concerns and Declining Trump Approval
item.description: A recent Fox News national survey highlights growing economic concerns among American voters and declining approval ratings for former President Donald Trump. The poll shows that 58% of respondents id...

item.title: Adventist University graduate leads May 2026 dentists licensure exam results
item.description: A graduate from the Adventist University of the Philippines, Nicole Pastor Joaquin, achieved the highest score in the dentists licensure examination held earlier in May 2026. The Professional Regulati...
